We have kids' books for babies [aged 0 to 3 years old](/personalized-books/kids/age/0-3), which make perfect baby shower or christening gifts. Our books for [kids aged 3 to 6](/personalized-books/kids/age/3-6) are written especially to spark a love of reading that will last a lifetime. Looking for a gift for [kids aged 6 and up](/personalized-books/kids/age/6-9)? Our personalized kids' books for this age range help kids feel brave, kind and confident. Adults don’t have to feel left out either – we even make [personalized books for grown-ups](/personalized-books/adults), too!"],"spans":[1,[]],"direction":[0,"ltr"]}]]]}],[0,{"question":[0,"Why do kids' books make good gifts?"],"answer":[1,[[0,{"type":[0,"paragraph"],"text":[0,"We believe a good story stays with a child longer than any toy or tablet game, which is why our kids' books make perfect treasure-forever keepsakes. There’s nothing more precious than a child’s imagination, and our magically personalized books let children see themselves doing extraordinary things. Each of our books is wonderfully one-of-a-kind, for a gift they’ve never seen before – and will never forget!"],"spans":[1,[]],"direction":[0,"ltr"]}]]]}],[0,{"question":[0,"Which kids' books do you recommend for younger children?"],"answer":[1,[[0,{"type":[0,"paragraph"],"text":[0,"Little ones love our bestselling story of self-discovery, [Lost My Name](/personalized-products/lost-my-name-v2-book), which is inspired by the letters of their name. If they’re BIG into dinosaurs (and what toddler isn’t?) then whisk them away on a romping, stomping adventure to Dino Land in [I’m a Name-O-Saurus](/personalized-products/personalised-dinosaur-book). Our super sweet bedtime book, [Bedtime For You](/personalized-products/bedtime-for-name-book) is the perfect way to soothe little ones to sleep, but if you’re looking for read-aloud fun, [Your Treasury of Nursery Rhymes](/personalized-products/treasury-of-nursery-rhymes-book) puts a personalized twist on over 30 classic songs and stories!"],"spans":[1,[]],"direction":[0,"ltr"]}]]]}],[0,{"question":[0,"Which kids' books do you recommend for older children?"],"answer":[1,[[0,{"type":[0,"paragraph"],"text":[0,"Whether they love sharing stories with friends and family or reading all by themselves, there’s a book to suit every older child. Our sensational search-and-find book [**Where Are You? Save the Multiverse!**](/personalized-products/where-are-you-3-book) is an epic adventure made for 1 to 3 kids to enjoy together. Celebrate the special bond between siblings with [**Me and My Big Brother / Big Sister**](/personalized-products/my-big-sibling-book) – a charming tale that magically grows up with them. Older children also love our terrific superhero tale [**It’s Super You!**](/personalized-products/super-you-book) which transforms them into an unstoppable hero. For new school starters, [**The Wondrous Road Ahead**](/personalized-products/the-wondrous-road-book) guides a child along the journey of life and celebrates their special strengths within."],"spans":[1,[]]}]]]}],[0,{"question":[0,"How do I personalize my kids' book?"],"answer":[1,[[0,{"type":[0,"paragraph"],"text":[0,"Every one of our books for kids can be personalized in different ways, depending on the story. To create your child’s unique book, you’ll usually follow these steps:\n\n- Add their name to the story and it’ll appear on the front cover, woven through the text and magically brought to life in the illustrations.\n\n- Choose their character from a range of avatars for boys, girls and even newborn babies!\n\n- Write your own dedication to show them how much they’re loved, every time they open their book. We’ll print your message for free on the very first page.\n\n- Pick a cover color for an extra-personal touch.\n\n- Preview your entire book before you buy."],"spans":[1,[]]}]]]}]]],"id":[0,"faqs$6d3c9064-1c00-49ec-b57d-4dbd348632e5"],"slice_type":[0,"faqs"],"slice_label":[0,null]}],[0,{"primary":[0,{"title_source":[0,"GlobalTitle"],"title":[1,[[0,{"type":[0,"heading1"],"text":[0,""],"spans":[1,[]]}]]],"email_label":[0,"Enter Books for Dads FAQs"]}],"items":[1,[[0,{"question":[0,"What makes Wonderbly’s personalized gifts for Dad so unique?"],"answer":[1,[[0,{"type":[0,"paragraph"],"text":[0,"At Wonderbly, we believe every dad deserves a story as one-of-a-kind as he is.
